title: Required Approvals
content: Minimum 3 independent human approvals: operator, reviewer, security. Each must be authenticated.

title: Operator Acknowledgement
content: Operator must acknowledge risks, read-only constraints, and emergency procedures.

title: Reviewer Acknowledgement
content: Reviewer must independently verify all safety controls are in place.

title: Security Review
content: Security reviewer must verify credential vault, access control, and audit logging.

title: Credential Vault Approval
content: Credential vault must be reviewed and approved before submit unlock.

title: Adapter Implementation Review
content: External adapter implementation must pass code review and safety scan.

title: Dry-Run Evidence
content: Complete dry-run evidence showing all safety controls work as designed.

title: Field-Test Scope
content: Defined scope for field test: symbols, notional caps, duration, rollback plan.

title: Max Notional Cap
content: Per-order notional cap must be set. Default: 100 USDT. Requires approval to increase.

title: Symbol Allowlist
content: Only approved symbols. Default: empty. Each symbol requires individual approval.

title: Kill Switch Proof
content: Kill switch must be tested and verified to block all submits.

title: Rollback Proof
content: Rollback procedure must be tested and verified.

title: Audit Retention Proof
content: Audit log retention must be verified: tamper-evident, external storage, 90-day retention.

title: Submit Unlock Expiration
content: Submit unlock must have an expiration time. Default: 24 hours. Requires re-approval to extend.

title: Submit Unlock Revocation
content: Any approver can revoke submit unlock immediately. Revocation logged.
